raw_input:
Extract structured data from the meeting note below. Return a JSON object with: date (YYYY-MM-DD), attendees (array of names), action_items (array of objects with {owner, task, due_date}). Only output JSON, no prose.

Note: "Standup on Thursday March 12 2026 at 9am. Present: Alex Chen, Priya Raman, Marcus Weiss. Discussed the Q2 plan. Action items from the call: Alex will finalize the roadmap draft by March 19. Priya owns the customer-research writeup, due March 25. Marcus follows up with legal on the DPA by end of this week (March 13)."
success_criteria: valid JSON conforming to the schema
attendees = ['Alex Chen', 'Priya Raman', 'Marcus Weiss'] (order may vary)
constraints: single JSON object, no markdown fences, no prose
